_comment: Farming Simulator 25 dedicated server (Wine, headless) for Pterodactyl / Calagopus. You must own a separate FS25 server license. Set your CD-key and the server downloads your own copy from the official GIANTS portal (license-gated by that serial) and installs it; no game content is bundled, hosted, or redistributed by this egg, and no copy protection is bypassed.
name: Farming Simulator 25
author: janik@mielemeier.com
description: Headless FS25 dedicated server running under Wine. Just set your CD-key: on first boot the server downloads your own copy from the official GIANTS portal, installs it, activates the key, and starts itself (you can also upload the installer manually instead). Management via the FS25 web portal (default port 7999).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# FS25 install script: prepare the directory layout and drop in guidance.
# The heavy Wine install happens on first server boot (start.sh). The game files
# are downloaded from the official GIANTS portal using your own serial, or you
# can upload an installer yourself.
set -e
mkdir -p /mnt/server/installer /mnt/server/dlc

cat > /mnt/server/README-FIRST.txt <<'EOF'
Farming Simulator 25 - dedicated server
=======================================

Easiest path (automatic download):
  1. Set the GAME_SERIAL variable in the panel to your FS25 server CD-key.
  2. Start the server. On first boot it downloads YOUR copy from the official
     GIANTS portal (gated by that serial), installs it silently, activates the
     key, installs DLCs, then launches. The base game is ~21 GB, so this first
     boot takes a while.
  3. Manage the running game via the web portal on the WEB_PORT allocation.

Manual path (instead of auto-download):
  - Upload the GIANTS installer into  installer/
      FarmingSimulator2025.exe / Setup.exe  or  FarmingSimulator25_*_ESD.img/.zip
  - (optional) DLC installers into  dlc/  (FarmingSimulator25_*.exe)
  - Set AUTO_DOWNLOAD=false if you do not want the auto-download attempt.

The Steam version cannot be used as a server. You need a separate server license.
EOF

echo 'Done. Set GAME_SERIAL (auto-download), or upload the installer into installer/, then start the server.'

variables.name: CD-Key / Serial
variables.description: Your FS25 server CD-key. Used on first boot to download your copy from the official GIANTS portal and to generate the license files. Leave empty only if you upload the installer AND pre-activated *.dat files manually.

variables.name: Auto-download game
variables.description: On first boot, download the game from the official GIANTS portal using your CD-key (license-gated). Set to false to require a manually uploaded installer instead.

variables.name: Auto-download DLCs
variables.description: Download and install the DLC installers your serial entitles you to. OFF by default: GIANTS' DLC installer is GUI-only with no silent mode, so the headless install can leave the DLC flagged as corrupt in the web manager, and Steam-version players who don't own the DLC see it as missing. Enable only if all players own the DLCs on GIANTS; otherwise install DLCs manually.

variables.name: Keep installer files
variables.description: Keep the ~40+ GB installer (the *_ESD.img and extracted Setup files) after installation. Off by default: they are deleted post-install to reclaim disk; re-download is automatic if you ever reinstall.

variables.name: Server name
variables.description: Name shown in the multiplayer server browser.

variables.name: Web portal username
variables.description: Login for the dedicated-server web management portal.

variables.name: Web portal password
variables.description: Password for the web management portal. Change this!

variables.name: Web portal port
variables.description: Port for the admin web management portal. Used internally to auto-start the game session, so it always works even if not exposed. To reach the portal in your browser, add a second allocation and set this to that allocation's port number (default 7999).

variables.name: In-game admin password
variables.description: Password to authenticate as admin from within the game.

variables.name: Game join password
variables.description: Password players must enter to join. Leave empty for an open server.

variables.name: Max players
variables.description: Maximum number of simultaneous players (game supports up to 16).

variables.name: Map ID
variables.description: Map to load, e.g. MapUS, MapFR, MapAlpine, or a mod map id.

variables.name: Pause if empty
variables.description: Pause behaviour when no players are connected (0 off, 2 default).
